Starter
Free
Perfect for small and personal servers.
$0 /mo
  • Basic moderation (ban, kick, warn)
  • Welcome & goodbye messages
  • Reaction roles (up to 5)
  • 1 ticket panel
  • Basic utility commands
  • Antinuke
  • Automod & anti-raid
  • Priority support

Pro
Premium
For active and growing communities.
$4.99 /mo
  • Everything in Free
  • Antinuke & mass action detection
  • Automod (spam, links, mentions)
  • Anti-raid protection
  • Unlimited reaction roles
  • Multiple ticket panels
  • Verification system
  • Priority support (24h response)

Business
For large networks and enterprises.
